title-group.article-title: Imaging of plexiform neurofibroma in neurofibromatosis type 1: a synthetic case report

license.license-p: This is an open access article distributed under the terms of the Creative Commons CC BY license.

sec.title: Case
sec.p: A patient with NF1 presented with a large mass.

caption.title: Axial MRI of the lesion.
caption.p: Contrast-enhanced T1-weighted axial MRI showing a large plexiform neurofibroma in the right paraspinal region of a patient with neurofibromatosis type 1.

caption.title: Histopathology.
caption.p: Hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) stained micrograph at 200x magnification demonstrating features consistent with a malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST).
